pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py explicitly require this output path.
Task instructions and setup_task.sh establish this dataset location.
Data inspection confirms 25 personality variables (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) exist in the dataset and are required by task instructions.
Task description strictly specifies 5 factors. Checked in verifier.py.
Task description strictly specifies Oblimin rotation. Checked in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Big Five Inventory (BFI) dataset, widely known from the R psych package. It contains 25 personality variables along with gender and age demographics. The required output and dataset paths, number of variables (25), factor count (5), and rotation (oblimin) precisely align with both the task instructions and the verification script.
